zh.lifeSummary: 當Mali ferch Ieuan於大約1364年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，她的父親Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan28歲，母親Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan24歲。她於大約1393年與Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mali ferch Ieuan于大约1364年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，她的父亲Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan28岁，母亲Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan24岁。她于大约1393年与Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mali
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ♂, occasionally ♀ Sanskrit: ‘jewel’; also used to denote the phallus. The name carries magical or mystical connotations. It is often used as a short form of  Subrahmanya , son of Shiva and brother of Ganesh.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mali ferch Ieuan was born about 1364, in Breconshire, Wales, her father, Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, was 24. She married Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn about 1393, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mali ferch Ieuan est née environ 1364, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn environ 1393, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mali ferch Ieuan um 1364 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan 24. Sie hat um 1393 in Wales Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mali ferch Ieuan è nata il circa 1364 nel Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn circa 1393, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Mali ferch Ieuanが約1364年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuanは28歳，母Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuanは24歳であった。約1393年にウェールズでIeuan Gwynedd ap Llywelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mali ferch Ieuan(이)가 대략 1364년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1393년 웨일스에서 Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mali ferch Ieuan nasceu aproximadamente 1364, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn aproximadamente 1393, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mali ferch Ieuan родилась около 1364 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn около 1393 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mali ferch Ieuan nació aproximadamente 1364, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Ieuan " Fychan" ap Ieuan, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ieuan Fychan ap Ieuan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Ieuan Gwynedd ap Llywelyn aproximadamente 1393, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas.
